mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY mmst.lvl,mmst.sort_seq) sort_num , mmst.lvl AS menu_lvl , mmst.menu_id , mmst.par_menu_id , mmst.menu_nm , mmst.menu_path , mmst.sort_seq sort_seq FROM (SELECT DISTINCT mmap.menu_id FROM ad_autr_menu_map mmap , ad_user_mst usr , ad_user_autr_map amap WHERE usr.user_id = #{userId} AND usr.user_id = amap.user_id AND amap.autr_id = mmap.autr_id ) umenu , (SELECT level AS lvl , mst.menu_id , mst.menu_nm , mst.menu_expl , mst.par_menu_id , mst.menu_path , mst.sort_seq FROM ad_menu_mst mst WHERE 1=1 AND mst.use_yn != 'N' AND mst.del_yn != 'Y' START WITH mst.par_menu_id IS NULL CONNECT BY mst.par_menu_id = PRIOR menu_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY mst.sort_seq) mmst WHERE umenu.menu_id = mmst.menu_id AND mmst.lvl IN (1,2,3) AND mmst.menu_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mmst.menu_id, mmst.sort_seq

SELECT mmst.menu_id , mmst.par_menu_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT mmap.menu_id FROM ad_autr_menu_map mmap , ad_user_mst usr , ad_user_autr_map amap WHERE usr.user_id = #{userId} AND usr.user_id = amap.user_id AND amap.autr_id = mmap.autr_id ) umenu , (SELECT level AS lvl , mst.menu_id , mst.menu_nm , mst.menu_expl , mst.par_menu_id , mst.menu_path , mst.sort_seq FROM ad_menu_mst mst WHERE 1=1 AND mst.use_yn != 'N' AND mst.del_yn != 'Y' START WITH mst.par_menu_id IS NULL CONNECT BY mst.par_menu_id = PRIOR menu_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY mst.sort_seq) mmst WHERE umenu.menu_id = mmst.menu_id AND mmst.lvl IN (3)
